title: Chapter 1: Introduction to Python and Environment Setup
description: An introduction to Python programming and setting up the development environment, including IDE installation.

title: Chapter 2: Syntax, Variables, and Data Types
description: Exploring the basic syntax of Python, understanding variables, and working with different data types.

title: Chapter 3: Control Structures: Conditionals & Loops
description: An overview of control structures in Python, focusing on conditionals and loops for decision-making and iteration.

title: Chapter 4: Functions and Scope
description: Understanding the concept of functions in Python, including their design, implementation, and variable scope.

title: Chapter 5: Data Structures: Lists and Tuples
description: Introduction to essential data structures such as lists and tuples, along with practical exercises to manipulate them.

title: Chapter 6: Data Structures: Dictionaries and Sets
description: Exploration of dictionaries and sets in Python, emphasizing data manipulation and group projects.

title: Chapter 7: Introduction to Libraries: NumPy
description: Hands-on lab session focusing on using the NumPy library for numeric data analysis.

title: Chapter 8: Data Analysis with Pandas
description: Practical exercises utilizing the Pandas library for data analysis and manipulation.

title: Chapter 9: Data Visualization with Matplotlib
description: Developing skills in data visualization through the Matplotlib library, including project work.

title: Chapter 10: Debugging and Testing
description: Learning debugging techniques and testing methodologies to improve code quality and performance.

title: Chapter 11: Capstone Project Planning
description: Group discussions to brainstorm and plan for the capstone project, focusing on best practices.

title: Chapter 12: Capstone Project Development
description: Practical project development for the capstone, receiving feedback from peers and the instructor.

title: Chapter 13: Capstone Project Preparation
description: Preparing for project presentations, focusing on effective communication skills.

title: Chapter 14: Capstone Project Presentations
description: Final group presentations of the capstone project, showcasing programming skills and project results.

title: Chapter 15: Course Review and Reflection
description: A comprehensive review of the course content and activities, along with reflective journaling.
